title: Zuckerberg reportedly wants a Polymarket clone — but without real money
summary: Mark Zuckerberg has tasked Meta with building an app similar to prediction markets Polymarket and Kalshi, internally called "Arena," which would let users bet with points instead of real money. Meta hasn't ruled out eventually allowing real money wagering. This continues Meta's pattern of copying popular features from other platforms.
content:
Mark Zuckerberg. | Image: Cath Virginia / The Verge; Getty Images	

Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg has tasked a small team at the company with making an app that works like the prediction markets Polymarket and Kalshi, according to The New York Times. The app, internally called "Arena" won't let users wager real money, but instead will "probably rely" on allowing users to bet with points, the NYT says - though Meta apparently hasn't ruled out eventually allowing people to bet with real money.
Should Meta's app launch publicly, it would be just the latest example of Meta taking a popular idea from another company and building its own version, like it did when it cloned Snapchat's Stories format and TikTok's vertic …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 扎克伯格据报想要Polymarket的克隆版——但不涉及真实资金
zh.summary: 马克·扎克伯格已指示Meta开发一款类似于预测市场Polymarket和Kalshi的应用程序，内部代号为"Arena"，允许用户用积分下注而非真实资金。Meta并未排除最终允许真实资金投注的可能性。这延续了Meta复制其他平台流行功能的模式。

title: These are my favorite Prime Day deals on earbuds and headphones
summary: The Verge's audio expert highlights the best Prime Day deals on headphones and earbuds, featuring the Sony WH-1000XM5 at under $200 and Bose QuietComfort Earbuds at $129. The article recommends several discounted models across budget and premium categories, including options from EarFun and other brands. These deals represent significant savings on quality audio devices during the Prime Day sale.
content:
The Sony XM5 have been some of the best noise-canceling headphones for a few years, and they’re now under $200 for Prime Day. | Photo by Chris Welch / The Verge	

I can’t think of a tech accessory I actively use more than headphones. Whether it’s for music, calls, or just to block out ambient noise so I can focus, I always have a pair close at hand. One of the best times to get some of your own with some big savings attached is during Prime Day.
There are always an overwhelming amount of deals on earbuds and headphones — and honestly, they’re not always that great. As The Verge’s audio expert, these are the ones that I think are worth their full cost, and especially so now that they’re on sale. And while Prime Day is an Amazon event, there are plenty of deals at other retailers like Best Buy and Walmart, too.
The best noise-canceling headphones and earbuds deals
They might not be the most recent XM series headphones Sony has released, but the Sony WH-1000XM5 are still one of the best pairs you can get — especially at a sale price of $198 at Amazon. At half of the retail price, this is the lowest I’ve ever seen these headphones. I’d go so far to say this is the best headphones deal of Prime Day. The XM5 are comfortable, sound excellent, and have noise-canceling performance that still holds up to more recent releases. If you need a new pair of headphones, get these before Prime Day ends.
Bose has been synonymous with noise cancellation for years now. While other companies — like Sony, Apple, and now the budget-minded Soundcore — have closed the gap in performance, the QuietComfort Earbuds still offer great noise-canceling performance. And they’re available during Prime Day for $129. These aren’t the newest ANC earbuds released by Bose (those are the Ultra earbuds gen 2 going for $249), but they’re a great deal for the sale price.
The best budget deals on headphones and earbuds
EarFun earbuds are always a good value, but especially so during Prime Day. You can find the

zh.title: 这些是我最喜欢的Prime Day耳机和耳塞优惠
zh.summary: The Verge的音频专家强调了最好的Prime Day耳机和耳塞优惠，包括索尼WH-1000XM5价格低于200美元和Bose QuietComfort耳塞129美元。该文章推荐了多款预算和高端类别的折扣型号，包括EarFun等品牌的选择。这些优惠在Prime Day期间代表了高质量音频设备的显著节省。

title: A curious crossover: The Toyota C-HR review
summary: Ars Technica reviews the Toyota C-HR, a compact electric vehicle that delivers engaging performance and handling despite its smaller size. The review suggests the C-HR offers spirited driving dynamics for those seeking a practical yet lively EV option. The vehicle balances efficiency with performance characteristics.
content: Although it's on the smaller side, this electric vehicle is not very chill.

zh.title: 一个有趣的跨界车型：丰田C-HR评测
zh.summary: Ars Technica评测了丰田C-HR，一款尽管体型较小但能提供引人入胜的性能和操控的紧凑型电动车。该评测表明C-HR为寻求实用但生动型电动车选项的人提供了充满活力的驾驶动态。该车型在效率和性能特性之间取得平衡。

title: ABC asks viewers to protest FCC attempt to "control who is allowed" on The View
summary: ABC is urging viewers to protest an FCC action that it claims would give the agency control over who can appear on broadcast programs like "The View." The network argues the regulatory action threatens editorial independence and content decisions. The dispute reflects broader tensions between broadcasters and federal regulators over content authority.
content: "The FCC wants to control who is allowed on the show," ABC ad tells viewers.

zh.title: ABC要求观众抗议FCC试图"控制谁被允许"在《观点》节目上的举动
zh.summary: ABC敦促观众抗议一项FCC行动,该行动声称会赋予该机构对谁可以出现在《观点》等广播节目上的控制权。该网络辩称这一监管行动威胁到编辑独立性和内容决策。这场争议反映了广播公司和联邦监管机构之间关于内容权力的更广泛紧张关系。

title: Early land animals skipped the tadpole phase
summary: Research suggests that early land vertebrates did not go through a tadpole phase, contrary to patterns seen in many modern amphibians. This finding challenges assumptions about how amphibian development evolved during the transition to land. Current amphibian development may not accurately reflect the developmental pathways of ancient land-dwelling species.
content: Current amphibian development may not have been typical of early land vertebrates.

zh.title: 早期陆地动物跳过了蝌蚪阶段
zh.summary: 研究表明早期陆地脊椎动物没有经历蝌蚪阶段,这与许多现代两栖动物中看到的模式不同。这一发现挑战了关于两栖动物发育在向陆地过渡期间如何演化的假设。当前两栖动物的发育可能不能准确反映古代陆地物种的发育途径。

title: Formula E’s new season is starting to look more like F1
summary: Formula E's next season will debut with a new race format, three new race locations (Austin, Kent, and Amsterdam), and new Gen4 electric cars starting in December. The series is introducing a shorter "Unleashed" E-Prix format alongside traditional races. This expansion includes the first two US race weekends since the series began in 2014.
content:
The next season of Formula E will feature a new race format and three new race locations when it starts in December to go with the new Gen4 electric cars. The schedule released today by the FIA includes the Circuit of the Americas in Austin, the Brands Hatch circuit in Kent, and the Zandvoort circuit in Amsterdam. As The Race mentions, this will give Formula E two weekends in the US for the first time since its inaugural season in 2014.
The electric racing series double-header weekends will also change, with two different types of races adding a shorter E-Prix "Unleashed" ahead of the main event. The new "Unleashed" format is a 30-minute sp …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 电动方程式新赛季开始看起来更像F1
zh.summary: 电动方程式的下一赛季将推出新的比赛格式、三个新的比赛地点(奥斯汀、肯特和阿姆斯特丹)和从12月开始的新Gen4电动赛车。该系列推出了一个更短的"释放"E-Prix格式以及传统比赛。这次扩展包括自2014年该系列成立以来的前两个美国比赛周末。

title: Anthropic’s Claude Tag is learning your company, one Slack message at a time
summary: Anthropic has launched Claude Tag, an AI teammate feature for Slack that provides always-on AI capabilities within enterprise environments. Beyond productivity improvements, the feature represents a strategic effort by Anthropic to capture organizational context and institutional knowledge through workplace interactions. The integration positions Claude as an embedded part of business workflows and decision-making.
content: Anthropic’s new Claude Tag brings an always-on AI teammate to Slack. But beyond productivity, the feature is a strategic play to capture organizational context, institutional knowledge, and enterprise workflows.

zh.title: Anthropic的Claude Tag正在通过一条条Slack消息了解你的公司
zh.summary: Anthropic推出了Claude Tag，这是Slack上的AI队友功能，为企业环境提供始终在线的AI能力。除了提高生产力外，该功能代表了Anthropic通过工作场所互动捕捉组织背景和机构知识的战略努力。该集成将Claude定位为业务工作流和决策制定的嵌入式部分。

title: The Pixel 10A finally costs what it should
summary: Google's Pixel 10A, which initially launched at $499 despite minimal upgrades from the Pixel 9A, is now discounted to $399 during Prime Day. The lower price point better reflects the device's incremental improvements, including satellite messaging and updated glass, while maintaining seven years of OS updates. The discount addresses criticism about the phone's value proposition at its original price.
content:
No camera bump here. | Photo: Dominic Preston / The Verge	

We can usually rely on Google to put together a compelling package in its Pixel A-series devices. The Pixel 10A was kind of a letdown, though. It added only a handful of updates, like satellite messaging and updated Gorilla Glass on the screen — but it still costs $499, like the Pixel 9A. Kind of a bummer.
Enter Prime Day: The 10A is down to $399 at Amazon, which feels much more fair. Getting essentially the 9A with the minor-est of iterative updates feels better when you’re paying $400 instead of $500. And staying consistent with the 9A, the 10A also offer seven years of OS updates. That’s a lot of years of not having to worry about buying another phone.
Google Pixel 10A
Google’s new Pixel 10A introduces faster wired charging, Satellite SOS, and new AI tools like Camera Coach and Auto Best Take. Otherwise, it’s basically the Pixel 9A, with the same Tensor G4 chip and a dual-camera system. Read our hands-on impressions.

Where to Buy:

 $499 $399 at Amazon (128GB)
 $499 $399 at Best Buy (128GB)
 $599 $499 at Amazon (256GB)

In fairness, the Pixel 10A is probably a victim of RAMageddon, and I suppose we’re lucky that it didn’t get a price increase this year. And it hasn’t been totally clear what kind of deals we’d see on phones in the midst of the memory crisis, even those that are consistently marked down, like the Pixel A-series. The Pixel 9A was marked down to $400 for last summer’s Prime Day, so the smaller discount this year might be a sign of the times. Still, it’s hard to argue with the 10A at $400 — unless you find a great deal on the 9A, that is.

zh.title: Pixel 10A终于降到合理价格了
zh.summary: 谷歌Pixel 10A最初以499美元的价格推出，尽管相比Pixel 9A升级幅度很小，但在Prime Day期间现已降价至399美元。较低的价格点更好地反映了该设备的增量改进，包括卫星通讯和更新的玻璃，同时保持七年的操作系统更新。该折扣解决了人们对该手机在原价时的价值主张的批评。

title: Laptop prices suck these days, so here are some Prime Day deals that help a little
summary: The Verge compiles Prime Day laptop and accessory deals amid an ongoing market downturn caused by rising memory and component costs that have inflated prices across the board. Featured deals include MacBook Pro with M5 chip at $1,549 and MacBook Air models with significant discounts. While Prime Day offers relief, it remains generally not an ideal time to purchase new laptops due to current pricing trends.
content:
The RAM, storage, and component crunch has come for new laptop prices. Plenty of models have gone up in price after being on the market for months, and so have those that’ve been on shelves for over a year. Plus, many new models are releasing at higher prices than the previous generation. So, it really isn’t the best time to buy a new laptop. But what if you need one or really want one now, and you prefer to shop new?
Well, I’m not here to tell you that Amazon’s Prime Day makes everything better. But the discounts certainly don’t hurt.
As usual, we’re doing our best to surface the best Prime Day tech deals. And here, we’ve pulled together the biggest discounts happening not just on laptops, but also on keyboards, mice, webcams, or other worthwhile PC accessories. And since Prime Day has counter-deals running at other retailers like Best Buy (and its Tech Fest Sale), there are also laptop deals for non-Amazon shoppers alike.
The best deals on MacBooks
The days of multi-hundred-dollar discounts on MacBooks are behind us for now, but the base 14-inch MacBook Pro with an M5 chip for $1,549 ($150 off) at Amazon and Best Buy is still a solid deal. It’s powerful enough for the average content creator, comes with 16GB of RAM and 1TB of storage, and has lots of ports. Read our review.
Apple MacBook Air (M5)
Apple’s 2026 MacBook Air has an M5 chip and starts with 512GB of storage that’s significantly faster than previous generations. It’s still as excellent as ever despite a higher base price. Read our review.

Where to Buy:

 $1099 $949.99 at Amazon (13-inch)
 $1099 $949 at Best Buy (13-inch)
 $1299 $1149.99 at Amazon (15-inch)

The 14-inch MacBook Pro with an M5 Pro chip (15-core CPU / 16-core GPU), 24GB of memory, and 1TB of storage is $2,034 (around $165 off) at Amazon and $2,049 at Best Buy. It’s a pretty nice step-up model from the standard M5 MacBook Pro, with a bit more RAM, a more powerful chip, and faster Thunderbolt 5 ports.
The best deals on Windows laptops
Micros

zh.title: 这些天笔记本电脑价格离谱，Prime Day有一些优惠能有所帮助
zh.summary: The Verge汇编了Prime Day笔记本电脑和配件交易，此前市场出现持续下行，原因是内存和零部件成本上升导致价格全面上涨。推荐的交易包括配备M5芯片的MacBook Pro售价1,549美元和MacBook Air型号的大幅折扣。虽然Prime Day提供了缓解，但由于当前的定价趋势，现在通常不是购买新笔记本电脑的理想时机。

title: Why corporate AI super PACs spent $27 million on a local election
summary: The Verge's Regulator newsletter explores how corporate-backed AI super PACs invested $27 million in a local election, raising questions about corporate influence in politics and regulatory capture. The article examines the motivations and implications of major tech companies' political spending at the local level. This reflects broader concerns about how tech companies are shaping the political landscape through financial influence.
content:
Hello and welcome to Regulator, the newsletter for Verge subscribers chronicling the misadventures of their favorite tech overlords and Washington swamp creatures. ("Favorite" is, of course, subjective.) Not a subscriber yet? Sign up here, especially if you want the hot scoop on quality Amazon Prime Day deals recommended by the wonderful humans of The Verge's newsroom, and not by a slop algorithm. 
Some news: The Verge now has a special subscription price of $10 / year for students with a valid email address! It gets you everything that a regular subscription gets: ad-free podcasts, subscriber Q&As, and much, much more.
We're coming to you …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 为什么企业人工智能超级政治行动委员会在当地选举中花费了2700万美元
zh.summary: The Verge的监管新闻通讯探讨了企业支持的人工智能超级政治行动委员会如何在当地选举中投入2700万美元,引发了关于企业在政治中的影响力和监管捕获的问题。该文章考察了大型科技公司进行地方政治支出的动机和影响。这反映了人们对科技公司如何通过财政影响力塑造政治格局的更广泛关注。

title: Trump may be mystery patient in odd case of 79yo getting experimental obesity drug
summary: A public notice regarding a single "compassionate use" approval for an experimental obesity drug for a 79-year-old patient raises speculation about whether former President Trump may be the unnamed recipient. The unusual nature of publicizing a single compassionate use case has drawn attention and scrutiny. The story highlights potential use of emergency drug approval processes for prominent individuals.
content: Public notice of a single "compassionate use" case is odd in every way.

zh.title: 特朗普可能是获得实验性肥胖症药物的79岁患者这一奇异案例中的神秘患者
zh.summary: 一份关于一项"人道主义使用"批准的公开通知涉及为一名79岁患者批准的实验性肥胖症药物,引发了人们对前总统特朗普是否可能是这位未公开身份接收者的猜测。公开宣传单个人道主义使用案例的不寻常性质引起了关注和审视。这个故事突出了对著名人士紧急药物批准程序的潜在使用。

title: Here are the best Prime Day deals on the Verge staff’s favorite stuff
summary: The Verge staff curates their favorite Prime Day 2026 deals across various product categories including tech and non-tech items. Featured discounts include the Logitech MX Master 3S mouse at $89.99, Eero Pro 6E mesh router systems with significant savings, and various smart home and kitchen appliances. The article filters through thousands of Prime Day deals to highlight products the publication's team genuinely recommends.
content:
While there are several thousand products discounted for Prime Day 2026, most of them aren’t what we’d call winners. We’ve already gathered the best Prime Day deals in our main roundup, but we’re dedicating this page to discounts on Verge-favorite items to help you find useful gear, whether it’s tech-adjacent or not. We’re covering Prime Day 2026 from every angle, including finding the best deals on Apple products, and deep discounts on some of our favorite robot vacuums. 
Logitech MX Master 3S

Where to Buy:

 $119.99 $89.99 at Amazon
 $119.99 $89.99 at Best Buy
 $119.99 at Logitech

Logitech has a very specific market in mind for the MX Master 3S. This is a mouse that’s meant for office and productivity work, where practical considerations are more important than 360 no scopes. Used for that purpose, it works quietly and feels great, thanks to its amazing scroll wheel, sculpted design, and ever-helpful secondary scroll wheel. Just be prepared to pick up an inexpensive USB extender if you run into any latency issues. — Jon Porter, senior reviewer
Eero Pro 6E tri-band router
Eero’s Pro 6E mesh router is the Amazon-owned company’s last-gen model. It supports the 6GHz Wi-Fi band with speeds of up to 1.3Gbps and covers up to 2,000 square feet with one unit. Wired speeds can go up to 2.5Gbps. Read our review.

Where to Buy:

 $249.99 $149.99 at Amazon (single pack)
 $449.99 $329.99 at Best Buy (three-pack)
 $449.99 $329.99 at Amazon (three-pack)

The tri-band Eero Pro 6E ($299 to $699) is another leap forward in home Wi-Fi for the company that popularized mesh Wi-Fi systems. And the Pro 6E certainly delivers. I saw significantly faster speeds over the previous generation Eero Pro 6 in my tests. But I also saw some network drop-offs, which Eero says is an issue around the Thread implementation — a key part of support for the coming smart home standard Matter that Eero has committed to. — Jennifer Pattison Tuohy, senior reviewer
Instant Pot Duo

Where to Buy:

 $99.99 $64

zh.title: 这是The Verge员工最喜爱的东西在Prime Day上的最佳交易
zh.summary: The Verge员工精选了他们最喜爱的2026年Prime Day交易,涵盖各种产品类别,包括科技和非科技商品。精选折扣包括罗技MX Master 3S鼠标(89.99美元)、具有显著节省的Eero Pro 6E网状路由器系统,以及各种智能家居和厨房电器。该文章从数千个Prime Day交易中进行了筛选,以突出该出版物团队真正推荐的产品。

title: Password manager maker LastPass says hackers stole customer support case data during Klue breach
summary: LastPass has disclosed that hackers obtained customer support case data through a breach of Klue, a company in its tech partner ecosystem. This represents the second significant security incident affecting LastPass customers in recent years. The breach highlights ongoing security risks in the password management industry and raises questions about supply chain vulnerabilities.
content: This is the second data breach to affect LastPass customers in recent years, after one of the password manager's tech partners was recently breached.

zh.title: 密码管理器制造商LastPass称黑客在Klue漏洞期间窃取了客户支持案例数据
zh.summary: LastPass披露黑客通过其技术合作伙伴生态系统中的Klue公司漏洞获得了客户支持案例数据。这是近年来影响LastPass客户的第二起重大安全事件。该漏洞突显了密码管理行业的持续安全风险,并引发了对供应链漏洞的疑问。

title: HaloBraid raises $7M from Seven Seven Six to end the six-hour hair salon appointment
summary: HaloBraid has secured $7 million in funding from venture capital firm Seven Seven Six to develop and launch a hair braiding assistant device for professional stylists. The device, slated to launch later this year, aims to reduce the time required for braiding appointments from six hours. This funding reflects growing interest in automation solutions for traditionally manual service industries.
content: HaloBraid aims to help salons speed up braiding with its first device, slated to launch later this year, that acts as a braiding assistant for professional stylists.

zh.title: HaloBraid从Seven Seven Six融资700万美元以结束六小时的美发沙龙预约
zh.summary: HaloBraid从风险投资公司Seven Seven Six获得了700万美元的融资,用于开发和推出专业发型师的头发编织辅助设备。该设备计划在今年晚些时候推出,目的是将编织预约所需的时间从六小时减少。这笔融资反映了传统手工服务行业对自动化解决方案日益增长的兴趣。

title: Meta debuts new, cheaper smart glasses under its own brand
summary: Meta has launched new, more affordable smart glasses under its own brand, with availability starting today in multiple countries. The glasses come in various color and lens options, representing Meta's continued push into the wearable technology market. This move suggests Meta is expanding its hardware offerings beyond its previous Ray-Ban partnership to reach a broader consumer market.
content: The smart glasses are available in several countries starting today in a variety of color and lens combinations.

zh.title: Meta推出自有品牌更便宜的新款智能眼镜
zh.summary: Meta在自有品牌下推出了新的、更便宜的智能眼镜,今天开始在多个国家上市。眼镜提供各种颜色和镜片选项,代表了Meta在可穿戴技术市场的持续推进。这一举措表明Meta正在扩展其硬件产品,超越之前的Ray-Ban合作伙伴关系,以覆盖更广泛的消费者市场。

title: Fika Jobs raises $4M to build a video-first hiring platform where AI agents interview candidates
summary: Fika Jobs secured $4M in funding to develop a video-first hiring platform powered by AI agents that conduct candidate interviews, addressing inefficiencies in traditional hiring processes. The platform responds to growing reliance on AI-powered screening systems by automating and streamlining the interview phase of recruitment.
content: The hiring process has long been criticized for its inefficiency and opacity. Candidates spend hours writing applications and submitting cover letters, only to disappear into what often feels like a black box. Generative AI has only made things messier, with employers increasingly relying on AI-powered screening systems to sift through an overwhelming number of submissions. […]

zh.title: Fika Jobs融资400万美元开发视频优先的招聘平台，由AI代理进行候选人面试
zh.summary: Fika Jobs获得400万美元融资，开发一个由AI代理进行候选人面试的视频优先招聘平台，解决传统招聘流程的低效问题。该平台应对越来越多依赖AI驱动的筛选系统，通过自动化和优化面试阶段来简化招聘流程。

title: My go-to Kindle is back at its best price yet for Prime Day
summary: Amazon's Kindle Paperwhite is discounted to $124.99 ($35 off) during Prime Day, with the Signature Edition available for $144.99. The device offers water resistance, a sharp display, excellent battery life, and lightweight portability, making it ideal for travel and commuting.
content:
The latest Kindle Paperwhite is $35 off. | Image: Amazon	

If you’ve been thinking about picking up a Kindle, Amazon’s Prime Day sale is a great time to do it. The retailer is currently offering steep discounts on several of its e-readers, including the latest Kindle Paperwhite with 16GB of storage and ads, which is down to $124.99 ($35 off) at Amazon. If you’d prefer wireless charging and double the storage, the ad-free Kindle Paperwhite Signature Edition is also on sale for $144.99 ($55 off) at Amazon.
Kindle Paperwhite (12th-gen)

Where to Buy:

 $159.99 $124.99 at Amazon (with ads)


Kindle Paperwhite Signature Edition

Where to Buy:

 $199.99 $144.99 at Amazon

The Kindle Paperwhite is the Kindle I recommend to most people because it gets all of the important things right. What I love most is that it offers an IPX8 water resistance rating, which means I never have to worry for its safety when I bring it into the bath, to the beach, or to the pool. That’s something the $109.99 entry-level Kindle can’t match.
It’s also the kind of gadget that’s especially useful for life on the go, whether that’s commuting or traveling for summer. Despite weighing less than the iPhone 17 Pro Max, it can store thousands of books and audiobooks, so you can bring a vacation’s worth of reading material without sacrificing luggage space. The battery also lasts long enough that you can often go months without reaching for a charger.
Most importantly, it’s a fantastic device to read on. The sharp, seven-inch display is easy to read outdoors in bright sunlight, while the adjustable warm light makes it comfortable to curl up with in bed. And if you somehow finish everything you’ve packed, it’s easy to download another title from Amazon’s Kindle Store in seconds and keep reading.
Read our Kindle Paperwhite review.

zh.title: 我常用的Kindle在Prime Day期间回到了有史以来最低价
zh.summary: 亚马逊Kindle Paperwhite在Prime Day期间折扣至124.99美元（优惠35美元），签名版可购买于144.99美元。该设备具有防水功能、清晰的显示屏、出色的电池续航和轻便的便携性，非常适合旅行和通勤。

title: Valve confirms it’s working with Intel and Nvidia on SteamOS for more GPUs
summary: Valve and Intel are collaborating to bring SteamOS to Intel-powered gaming handhelds like the MSI Claw, moving away from Windows-based experiences on portable devices. SteamOS 3.8 introduces firmware for upcoming Intel handhelds and controller support, with users reporting positive experiences.
content:
A YouTuber got SteamOS running on an MSI Claw 8 AI Plus like this one. | Photo by Sean Hollister / The Verge	

MSI's Intel-powered Claw gaming handhelds have so far mostly been Windows machines, meaning that anyone who picks one up has to deal with the crusty experience that is Windows on a handheld gaming PC. But now, both Valve and Intel tell The Verge that they're working with each other, and people like YouTuber ETA Prime are already having good experiences with SteamOS on Intel. 
Valve's recently launched SteamOS 3.8 update spells out that Valve has added "initial firmware for upcoming Intel handhelds" and controller support for some MSI Claw devices, including last year's well-received 8 AI Plus. ETA Prime actually got a beta of SteamOS 3.8 ru …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Valve确认正与Intel和Nvidia合作改进SteamOS以支持更多GPU
zh.summary: Valve和Intel合作将SteamOS引入英特尔驱动的游戏掌机（如MSI Claw），摆脱便携设备上基于Windows的体验。SteamOS 3.8为即将推出的英特尔掌机和控制器支持引入固件，用户报告体验积极。

title: I’m not giving up my Steam Deck for MSI’s new Claw
summary: A Verge writer evaluates whether the MSI Claw 8 EX AI Plus, featuring Intel's new Arc G3 Extreme chip, offers a compelling upgrade for Steam Deck OLED owners despite its $1,799 price tag versus the $789 Deck. The analysis examines whether the next-generation handheld justifies the significant cost difference.
content:
This is not a review of the MSI Claw 8 EX AI Plus, the first gaming handheld available with Intel's new Arc G3 Extreme handheld gaming chip. Now that my colleague Sean Hollister is done reviewing the Steam Machine, I'll let him go deep on the new Claw at some point in the future. This article, instead, is my first impressions of the new MSI Claw as someone who primarily plays games on a Steam Deck OLED. Sean called the Claw the "next-gen handheld," and I wanted to find out: Would it be a worthwhile upgrade for Deck fans like me? Could it possibly be worth the eye-watering $1,799 price?
For me, the Claw has a high bar to clear. The $789 Stea …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 我不会因为MSI新款Claw而放弃我的Steam Deck
zh.summary: The Verge的一位作家评估配备英特尔新型Arc G3 Extreme芯片的MSI Claw 8 EX AI Plus是否为Steam Deck OLED用户提供了引人注目的升级选项，尽管其价格为1,799美元，而Steam Deck仅为789美元。该分析探讨了这款下一代掌上游戏机是否能够证明这一重大价格差异是合理的。

title: Meta launches cheaper smart glasses without Ray-Ban
summary: Meta released new smart glasses under its own brand in multiple styles and colors, including a collaboration with Kylie Jenner, breaking its prior reliance on Ray-Ban partnerships. The move marks Meta's transition to establishing its own design identity in the smart glasses market.
content:
For the past three years, "Meta" and "Ray-Ban" have been synonymous in the smart glasses space. Not anymore. Yesterday, I slipped on several pairs of Meta Glasses - no Ray-Bans - in three different styles and seven colors. One style, I was told several times by various enthusiastic Meta spokespeople, is a collaboration with socialite and reality TV star Kylie Jenner.
Meta could've struck out on its own from the get-go, but teaming up with EssilorLuxottica and the Ray-Ban brand was a savvy move in entering the smart glasses space. Previous smart glasses looked straight out of a sci-fi flick, or were just dorky enough to be unappealing. Ray-B …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Meta推出不依赖Ray-Ban的廉价智能眼镜
zh.summary: Meta以自有品牌推出新型智能眼镜，提供多种款式和颜色，包括与凯莉·詹娜的合作，打破了其之前对Ray-Ban合作伙伴关系的依赖。此举标志着Meta在智能眼镜市场中建立自身设计身份的重要转变。

title: The best Prime Day deals we found on our favorite gear
summary: The Verge highlights top Prime Day deals across multiple tech categories, including MacBook Pro M5 models discounted to $1,549 and gaming laptops like the Asus ROG Zephyrus G14 at $1,449.99. The shopping event runs through June 27th with significant discounts on electronics across Amazon, Best Buy, and Walmart.
content:
Amazon’s Prime Day is on, and it’s happening for the next four days. Prime members can jump into the deals now until the sale officially ends at 3:01AM ET / 12:01AM PT June 27th. Many discounts will remain the same throughout the duration.
We’ve been covering Prime Day in-depth since the shopping event debuted over a decade ago. Each year, the quantity of deals has grown, making it tougher to spot the quality ones. But we know what we like, and we have a pretty good sense of what Verge readers might like, too. Our writers flagged dozens of deals that got their attention across various categories, including new products and some slightly older favorites, and we think you might want to see them.
If you’re got a Prime subscription (via a free trial, or a discounted student membership), then scroll through to see the best that day one of Prime Day has to offer.
Laptop deals
The days of multi-hundred-dollar discounts on MacBooks are behind us for now, but the base 14-inch MacBook Pro with an M5 chip for $1,549 ($150 off) at Amazon and Best Buy is still a solid deal. It’s powerful enough for the average content creator, comes with 16GB of RAM and 1TB of storage, and has lots of ports. Read our review.
Apple MacBook Air (M5)
Apple’s 2026 MacBook Air has an M5 chip and starts with 512GB of storage that’s significantly faster than previous generations. It’s still as excellent as ever despite a higher base price. Read our review.

Where to Buy:

 $1099 $949.99 at Amazon (13-inch)
 $1099 $949 at Best Buy (13-inch)
 $1299 $1149.99 at Amazon (15-inch)


2025 Asus ROG Zephyrus G14
Asus’ ROG Zephyrus G14 is the go-to choice for a portable gaming machine that’s great at regular laptop duties. It’s got a lovely OLED display, great keyboard and trackpad, and solid battery life. There’s a new Intel model that’s much pricier, but the 2025 version with AMD chips is still a great choice.

Where to Buy:

 $2299.99 $1449.99 at Best Buy (Ryzen 9 270, RTX 5060, 16GB, 1TB)
 $3169.99 $2699.99

zh.title: 我们发现的最喜欢设备上最好的Prime Day优惠
zh.summary: The Verge重点介绍了多个科技类别中的顶级Prime Day优惠，包括MacBook Pro M5型号降价至1,549美元，以及华硕ROG Zephyrus G14等游戏笔记本电脑的1,449.99美元折扣。这一购物活动持续至6月27日，在亚马逊、百思买和沃尔玛等平台上提供大幅的电子产品折扣。

title: How to burst the AI bubble: Strike at its roots
summary: Sci-fi author and tech journalist Cory Doctorow discusses his new book, "The Reverse Centaur's Guide to Life After AI," examining the artificial intelligence bubble and systemic issues underlying AI hype. The work offers perspectives on technology trajectories and what comes after the current AI market cycle.
content: Sci-fi author/tech journalist Cory Doctorow on his new book, The Reverse Centaur's Guide to Life After AI.

zh.title: 如何戳破AI泡沫：从根源入手
zh.summary: 科幻作家兼科技记者科里·多克托罗讨论他的新书《反向人马指南：AI之后的生活》,该书审视了人工智能泡沫以及AI炒作背后的系统性问题。这部作品提供了对技术发展轨迹和当前AI市场周期之后会发生什么的见解。

title: These are the best smart home deals this Prime Day
summary: Prime Day features significant discounts on smart home essentials including mesh Wi-Fi routers, video doorbells, and smart locks from eero, Google Nest, Ecobee, and Ring. The sale covers foundational smart home tech at multiple price points, with eero Pro 7 down to $549.99 and Ring doorbell cameras at 50% off.
content:
Smart locks and smart doorbells are on sale for Prime Day. | Photo by Jennifer Pattison Tuohy / The Verge	

Every Prime Day is a good day to make your home smarter, as deals on connected gear proliferate not just on Amazon but all across the web. And this Prime Day is no different. I sifted through hundreds of offers to find the ones that actually stand out — only the deepest discounts on the best products made the cut. Whether you need faster Wi-Fi, a better video doorbell, a more capable smart lock, or a robot vacuum that can keep up with your floors, these are the gadgets I recommend grabbing while prices are low.
Good value Wi-Fi 
The foundation of a good smart home is Wi-Fi, so if you’re still rocking a router with Wi-Fi 6 or even 5, Prime Day is a good time to upgrade. All of Amazon’s eero mesh Wifi routers are on sale, and its flagship eero Pro 7 is down to $549.99 from $699.99. If you don’t need that much power, the equally capable eero Pro 6E is down to $329 for a three-pack.
Google Nest Wifi Pro
If you’re a Google smart home user, the Google Nest Wifi Pro sporting 6E is almost 40 percent off for a three-pack. In addition to Wi-Fi 6E, the Pro supports Matter and Thread smart home connectivity.

Where to Buy:

 $399.99 $249.99 at Amazon (three)

Smarter doorbells for less
Ecobee Smart Doorbell Camera
The excellent Ecobee Smart Doorbell Camera is down to $119. It features free person detection and works with every smart home platform. Plus, if you have an Ecobee Thermostat, you can use it as a video intercom.

Where to Buy:

 $159.99 $117.99 at Amazon
 $159.99 $129.99 at Ecobee

Ring’s newest doorbell cameras are 50 percent off for Prime Day. The Ring Wired 2K is $39.99, and the Ring Battery 2K is $49.99. These aren’t top-of-the-line; that’s the Pro 4K model (which is on sale for 28 percent off, down to $179.99). But 2K video still works with Ring’s AI-powered features, which give you a clearer picture of what’s happening around your home. These require a Rin

zh.title: Prime Day最佳智能家居优惠
zh.summary: Prime Day期间,包括eero、Google Nest、Ecobee和Ring在内的智能家居必需品大幅折扣,涵盖网状Wi-Fi路由器、视频门铃和智能锁。促销活动覆盖多个价格段的基础智能家居产品,其中eero Pro 7降价至$549.99,Ring门铃摄像头享受五折优惠。

title: Elon Musk and the plot to hijack America’s broadband
summary: A Blue Origin New Glenn rocket carrying Amazon Leo satellites exploded during a hot-fire test at Cape Canaveral, setting back Amazon's ambitious satellite internet venture backed by Biden-era digital divide funding. The incident impacts multiple parties' plans to expand broadband access through competing satellite initiatives.
content:
At 9PM ET on the night of May 28th, a Blue Origin New Glenn rocket sat on the launchpad at the Cape Canaveral Space Force Station. The craft was in the middle of a hot-fire test awaiting the arrival of Amazon Leo satellites, the first of 24 batches to be shuttled into low Earth orbit for an ambitious satellite internet venture. The effort was backed by hundreds of millions of taxpayer dollars, leveraging a Biden-era law meant to address America's digital divide.
But before the satellites even reached the launch site, Jeff Bezos' rocket exploded into a massive fireball, its wreckage left smoldering on the ground. It was an unintentionally pe …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 埃隆·马斯克与美国宽带争夺战
zh.summary: 蓝色起源新格伦火箭在卡纳维拉尔角进行热火测试时爆炸,导致搭载的亚马逊Leo卫星损失,这打击了亚马逊雄心勃勃的卫星互联网项目——该项目获得了拜登时代数字鸿沟资金的支持。此事件将影响多方通过竞争性卫星计划扩展宽带接入的规划。

title: The best robot vacuum deals available during Prime Day
summary: Prime Day offers significant discounts on robot vacuums across price ranges, from budget-friendly models like the Roborock Q10 S5 Plus at $264.99 to premium options like the Saros 20 at $1,424.99. The sale features models with varying capabilities from basic cleaning to advanced mopping and threshold-climbing.
content:
The Roborock Saros 10 (pictured here) and Saros 20 are both on sale. | Photo by Jennifer Pattison Tuohy / The Verge	

If you’ve been wanting to buy a robot vacuum but have been put off by how much it can cost to get a good one, now is not a bad time to start looking. Prime Day has kicked off, though more than just Amazon is offering deals on several models we’ve tested from brands like Roborock, Dreame, and Shark. Whether you’re looking for a basic robot vacuum that can cut down on the amount of vacuuming you have to do or a high-end model that can wash and dry its own mop pads and climb over room thresholds, there are deals available across a wide range of price points.
Roborock Saros 20

Where to Buy:

 $1599.99 $1424.99 at Amazon


Roborock Saros 10
Roborock’s Saros 10 combines powerful 22,000Pa suction with excellent dual spinning mop pads that do a great job tackling dried-on messes. It can also automatically leave its mop pads at the dock before vacuuming carpets. The newer Saros 20 offers more powerful suction and can tackle taller thresholds, but the Saros 10 is still a great cleaning machine.

Where to Buy:

 $1599.99 $999.99 at Best Buy
 $1599.99 $1299.99 at Roborock

The Roborock Q10 S5 Plus is down to $264.99 ($285 off) at Amazon, which matches its lowest price to date. The Q10 S5 Plus is one of our favorite budget-friendly robot vacuum / mop hybrids, combining good AI-powered obstacle avoidance with automatic carpet detection. It also features a vibrating mop that does a solid job scrubbing hard floors while lifting itself over rugs, and the set includes a self-emptying dock for added convenience. It can’t match the suction power or tall threshold-climbing abilities of pricier models like the Saros 20, but this is a good value under $300.
The Tapo RV30 Max is another excellent budget-friendly option that’s on sale. It includes a self-emptying dock and costs $199.99 at Amazon. You don’t get AI-powered obstacle avoidance with this one, and its 5,200Pa suc

zh.title: Prime Day期间最佳扫地机器人优惠
zh.summary: Prime Day为各种价位的扫地机器人提供大幅折扣,从Roborock Q10 S5 Plus等经济型机型(264.99美元)到Saros 20等高端选择(1,424.99美元)不等。此次促销包含具有各种功能的机型,从基础清洁到高级拖地和越障功能。

title: The best Apple deals you can get during Prime Day
summary: Apple products are heavily discounted during Prime Day, with AirPods Pro 3 at $179.99 (record low), AirPods 4 at $99, and AirPods Max 2 receiving $150 discounts. Many items hit their lowest prices, though inventory fluctuates throughout the event.
content:
Amazon’s Prime Day sale is here, and whether you’re looking for a new pair of wireless earbuds or a smartwatch, there’s a good chance you’ll find a discount. The Apple Watch Series 11 has already dropped to a new low price, while the AirPods Pro 3 recently hit a record-low $169 at Walmart. That particular deal has sold out, but the earbuds remain discounted to $179 at Amazon and Best Buy, and the lower price could return given how volatile the sale has been.
For now, the below are the best Apple deals currently available. We’ll continue updating this guide throughout Prime Day, highlighting the best Apple deals as they become available.
Earbud and headphone deals
AirPods Pro 3
The latest AirPods Pro offer improved noise cancellation and richer bass, along with built-in heart sensors that work with Apple’s Fitness app to monitor calories burned across more than 50 workouts. Read our review.

Where to Buy:

 $249 $179.99 at Amazon
 $249 $179.99 at Best Buy

The AirPods 4 are on sale at Amazon, Walmart, and Best Buy for $99 ($30 off). Apple’s entry-level earbuds offer richer bass than previous generations along with a more robust IP54 rating for water and dust resistance. They match the latest AirPods Pro in voice call quality and work well with other Apple devices too, though they lack more advanced features like active noise cancellation. It might be a pro or con to some that this model simply rests in your ear. They don’t create a tight seal like the AirPods Pro.
The AirPods 4 with Active Noise Cancellation and wireless charging are also on sale at Amazon, Walmart, and Best Buy for $148.99 ($30 off). It’s a solid deal, but given the AirPods Pro 3 are currently available for about $20 or so more, we’d recommend buying those instead. They drown out noise better and offer additional features like a heart rate sensor that justify the small price difference. Read our review.
AirPods Max 2
Apple’s over-ears retain the premium design of the original while delivering improv

zh.title: Prime Day期间能获得的最佳Apple优惠
zh.summary: Apple产品在Prime Day期间大幅折扣,AirPods Pro 3售价179.99美元(历史新低),AirPods 4售价99美元,AirPods Max 2获得150美元折扣。许多产品达到最低价格,但库存在活动期间波动。

title: The Verge’s guide to Amazon Prime Day 2026
summary: The Verge's comprehensive Prime Day guide compiles coverage of the 2026 sale running through June 27th, featuring discounts on smart home, headphones, smartwatches, laptops, TVs, and outdoor gear across Amazon, Best Buy, and Walmart. The guide includes shopping tips, price-matching policies, and consolidated links to category-specific deal roundups.
content:
Amazon Prime Day 2026 is happening now and is delivering some of the best deals we’ve seen this summer. As expected, there were a ton of price drops at Amazon, Best Buy, and Walmart on a range of product categories, including smart home, headphones, smartwatches, monitors, 4K TVs, outdoorsy gear, and more. Amazon’s sale will conclude at 3:01AM ET on June 27th.
We’ve put together this package so you can see all of our sprawling coverage in one convenient place. It contains not just our favorite one-off deals and category roundups to come, but also some shopping tips that might help you price-match purchases, and be the first to find amazing deals.

zh.title: The Verge的2026年Amazon Prime Day指南
zh.summary: The Verge的综合Prime Day指南汇总了2026年促销活动的报道,促销活动持续至6月27日,包括Amazon、Best Buy和Walmart上智能家居、耳机、智能手表、笔记本电脑、电视和户外装备的折扣。该指南包括购物提示、价格匹配政策和分类优惠汇总的整合链接。

title: Amflow’s TL e-bike is ready for baby’s first mountain adventure
summary: Amflow, the e-bike brand spun out of DJI, launched its TL series designed as a versatile "eSUV" for both bikepacking adventures and family commuting. The all-terrain model features a powerful 1100W mid-drive motor with up to 1280Wh of expandable battery capacity. This represents the trend toward high-performance electric bikes that combine serious capability with practical family utility.
content:
A family “eSUV” designed to be fun and practical. | Image: Amflow	

Amflow, the e-bike brand spun out of DJI, just announced its TL series, a do-it-all "eSUV" suitable for both bikepacking adventures and dropping the kid at daycare on your cycle to work.
The all-terrain TL series is built around Amflow's incredibly compact yet powerful Avinox M2 mid-drive motor. The Amflow TL Carbon offers 125Nm of hill-flattening torque and up to 1100W of peak output. It supports up to 1280Wh of battery capacity when its 800Wh removable battery is paired with a 480Wh extender. You can even opt for a hub that charges up to four batteries sequentially.
This sport-tourer comes standard with mudguards, integrated lights, and  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Amflow TL电动自行车已准备好带宝宝进行第一次山地冒险
zh.summary: Amflow是大疆旗下的电动自行车品牌，推出了TL系列，设计为多功能"电动SUV"，适用于自行车背包旅行和家庭通勤。全地形车型配备强劲的1100W中驱电动机和高达1280Wh的可扩展电池容量。这代表了高性能电动自行车的发展趋势，将严肃的性能与实用的家庭效用相结合。

title: With Starfall, SpaceX eyes an edge in global cargo delivery from orbit
summary: SpaceX is developing Starfall, a system designed to transport and deliver goods through space. This initiative marks SpaceX's expansion into orbital logistics beyond traditional launch services. The service could reshape global supply chains by enabling fast delivery from orbit.
content: The purpose of Starfall is to support the "transport and delivery of goods through space."

zh.title: SpaceX通过Starfall寻求在全球轨道货物配送中获得优势
zh.summary: SpaceX正在开发Starfall，这是一个设计用于通过太空运输和交付货物的系统。这项举措标志着SpaceX在传统发射服务之外扩展到轨道物流领域。这项服务通过实现从轨道进行快速配送，可能会重塑全球供应链。

title: The running list: major tech layoffs in 2026 where employers cited AI
summary: TechCrunch is compiling a comprehensive list of major tech company layoffs in 2026 where employers explicitly cited AI as a factor. The tracking reflects ongoing industry consolidation as companies restructure around AI capabilities. This index documents the workforce reduction impact as AI adoption accelerates across the tech sector.
content: A running look — in reverse chronological order — at the bigger tech companies that have announced significant layoffs this year with AI as a stated factor.

zh.title: 2026年科技行业大规模裁员名单：雇主引用AI作为原因
zh.summary: TechCrunch正在编制2026年科技公司大规模裁员的综合名单，其中雇主明确将AI作为一个因素。这个跟踪反映了正在进行的行业整合，因为公司围绕AI能力进行重组。这个指数记录了随着AI在科技部门加快采用而带来的劳动力减少影响。

title: OpenAI launches new initiative to help find and patch open-source bugs
summary: OpenAI is launching an initiative to help the open-source software community find and patch security vulnerabilities. This effort addresses systemic security issues affecting the broader developer ecosystem.
content: OpenAI is attempting to tackle the security issues of the open source software community.

zh.title: OpenAI 启动新举措帮助发现和修复开源软件漏洞
zh.summary: OpenAI 正在启动一项倡议，帮助开源软件社区发现和修补安全漏洞。这项工作旨在解决影响更广泛开发者生态系统的系统性安全问题。
